_meta.title: Data Protection to BNM RMiT Cross-Reference
_meta._mappingNote: References use RMiT section and clause numbers (e.g. S10.4, S10.46) which map to regulatory text paragraphs, not to individual control slugs in the RMIT controls/library.json. Closest slug-level equivalents: S10.4-S10.5 -> technology-risk-management-framework; S10.46-S10.48 -> cryptographic-controls, key-and-certificate-management; S10.50 -> cloud-risk-assessment; S10.52 -> data-loss-prevention; S10.55 -> outsourcing-notification; S10.62-S10.65 -> backup-management, cloud-data-residency, cloud-portability-and-exit.

mappings.description: Data classification and handling based on sensitivity as required by RMiT
Encryption of confidential data at rest including in cloud environments
Encryption of data in transit across networks
Data leakage prevention across all channels
Key management and customer control of encryption keys in cloud
Encrypted backups, offline copies, recovery testing, and ransomware resilience
